headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Surges 1,300 Points, Oil Prices Crash On U.S.-Iran Ceasefire (Live Coverage)
summary: Futures for the Dow Jones Industrial Average and other major stock indexes soared ahead of Wednesday's trading session after President Donald Trump suspended Iran attacks for two weeks while Tehran agreed to open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Oil Prices Bounce; Iran Says Hormuz Opening Hinges On Israel, But S&P 500 Rallies
summary: Crude oil prices plunged more than $20 a barrel from Tuesday's peak after President Donald Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire and Iran agreed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  United Airlines, Carnival and fellow cruise and airline stocks still ranked among top S&P 500 winners in morning trade.  Gold, silver and copper prices all jumped, fueling gains for Newmont and Freeport-McMoRan, though they came well off their highs.

Gold, silver and copper prices all jumped, fueling gains for Newmont and Freeport-McMoRan, though they came well off their highs.

headline: Goldstorm Metals Announces Drill Targets for the Crown Property Utilizing Results of an Independent Geophysical Review, and Appoints Joel Ashburner as Chief Geologist
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - April 8, 2026) - Goldstorm Metals Corp. headline: Shares of precious metal companies are trading higher amid rising gold and silver prices and a weakened U.S. dollar.  Easing energy prices in response to the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement and President Trump's social media post may lift metals demand and hasten future rate cuts.
